title: Tetrataenium olgae

intro: Tetrataenium olgae, also known as Oligostigma olgae, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, classified as a perennial herb in the family Apiaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine for treating various ailments.
